Resonant At-Onement is a state of lowest [[Underseeing]] where one is seeing pure consciousness<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bPHqY4WiwwU</ref>

== See Also ==

* [[Resonant At-Onement]]
* [[Perknowledge]]

== References ==
[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[sn:Pure Consciousness Event]][[Category:Underseer]]
[[Category:Disruptive Strategies]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Pure Consciousness Event]][[sn:Pure Consciousness Event]][[sn:Pure Consciousness Event]][[Category:Higher States of Consciousness]]
[[Category:Pages]]
